title: BrightFunded Rules Explained: Drawdown, Profit Targets & Time Limits (2026)

meta_description: BrightFunded Rules Explained: Drawdown, Profit Targets & Time Limits (2026). BrightFunded (4.2★, $55/mo). Every rule explained: drawdown, profit targets, payout
excerpt: Every BrightFunded rule explained in plain language — drawdown limits, profit targets, trading restrictions, and payout terms.
content:
BrightFunded Rules Overview

BrightFunded is a Netherlands-based proprietary trading firm founded in 2023 that operates a 2-step evaluation model for traders seeking funded accounts. The firm specializes in CFD trading across forex, crypto, indices, and commodities markets, offering accounts from $5,000 to $200,000 with an unusually fast payout structure (~4 hours average) and a unique Trade2Earn loyalty program. Traders must pass two phases of profit targets and drawdown requirements to earn a funded account and begin drawing profits from their trading.

Account Types and Pricing

BrightFunded offers four tiered account packages, each with a one-time challenge fee. Traders select an account size and pay the monthly subscription fee to begin their evaluation period.

Account Size Monthly Subscription Estimated Challenge Cost
$5,000 $55/month $55 (initial month)
$10,000 $95/month $95 (initial month)
$25,000 $195/month $195 (initial month)
$200,000 $297/month $297 (initial month)

Challenge Fee Refund: If a trader passes their evaluation challenge, the subscription fees are typically credited toward funded account setup or waived, though traders should verify current refund policies with BrightFunded directly.

Profit Targets

BrightFunded operates a two-phase challenge structure. Traders must reach specific profit targets in each phase to progress toward a funded account.

  • Phase 1 (Initial Challenge): Traders must achieve an 8-10% profit target on their account size. For example, on a $10,000 account, the Phase 1 target would be $800–$1,000 in profit.
  • Phase 2 (Verification Phase): After passing Phase 1, traders enter Phase 2 with a reduced profit target of approximately 5% to verify consistency. A $10,000 trader would need $500 additional profit.
  • Profit Target Calculation: Targets are calculated as a percentage of the initial account balance, not the floating balance. This means traders cannot reduce targets by withdrawing profits mid-challenge.

Timeline Flexibility: BrightFunded allows traders to complete both phases at their own pace with no strict time limit, though extended periods (typically beyond 60–90 days) may trigger account review.

Drawdown Rules

BrightFunded enforces strict risk management through daily and maximum drawdown limits to protect account capital and ensure trading discipline.

  • Daily Drawdown Limit: Traders cannot lose more than 5% of their account balance in a single day. On a $10,000 account, the daily loss limit is $500.
  • Maximum Drawdown (Trailing): The overall maximum drawdown is typically 10% from the account's peak balance during the challenge. This is a trailing drawdown, meaning it resets to the current balance once a new peak is reached.
  • Calculation Method: Drawdown is calculated from the highest balance reached during the trading period. If a trader peaks at $10,500 and then loses to $9,450, the drawdown is calculated from $10,500 (a 10% loss), triggering elimination.
  • Reset Conditions: Daily drawdown limits reset at market open (typically 00:00 UTC for forex). However, the maximum drawdown (trailing) does not reset and continues throughout the challenge.

Margin Calls: Accounts with insufficient margin to open new positions will be subject to forced liquidation. Traders should maintain awareness of leverage usage to avoid unexpected position closures.

Trading Restrictions

BrightFunded imposes specific trading rules to ensure responsible trading and prevent high-risk strategies during the evaluation period.

  • Expert Advisors (EAs) / Algorithmic Trading: Fully permitted. BrightFunded explicitly supports automated trading via EAs on MT5, cTrader, and DXtrade platforms. This is a key competitive advantage for algorithmic traders.
  • Lot Size Restrictions: Maximum lot size per trade is typically limited to 10% of account balance per position to prevent overleveraging. Traders should verify exact limits on their chosen platform.
  • News Trading: Allowed during the challenge, though traders should exercise caution during major economic announcements (Fed announcements, NFP, etc.) as volatility may trigger drawdown violations quickly.
  • Weekend Holding: Positions may be held over weekends, though traders should be aware of gap risk at market open on Monday, which could trigger unexpected drawdown violations.
  • Restricted Instruments: Traders are limited to the four market categories: forex, crypto CFDs, indices CFDs, and commodities CFDs. No futures, stocks, options, or traditional equities trading.
  • Copy Trading / Signal Services: Typically not permitted, though traders are encouraged to verify BrightFunded's current policy on signal subscriptions.
  • Scalping / High-Frequency Trading: Permitted, though accounts with excessive transaction frequency (>100 trades/day) may trigger compliance review.

Profit Split and Payouts

One of BrightFunded's standout features is its ultra-fast payout structure and generous profit splits.

  • Profit Split: Funded traders receive 80–100% of profits generated on their funded account. The exact percentage depends on account tier and trading volume, with consistent traders earning higher splits.
  • Withdrawal Frequency: Traders can request withdrawals as frequently as daily, making BrightFunded ideal for traders seeking regular income from trading.
  • Processing Time: Payouts are processed in approximately 4 hours on average, with a guaranteed maximum of 24 hours. This is significantly faster than most competitors (typically 5–10 business days).
  • Minimum Withdrawal Amount: The minimum withdrawal is typically $100, though traders should confirm current minimums.
  • Withdrawal Methods: Withdrawals are processed via the same methods used for initial funding (bank transfer, payment processor), depending on region.
  • Trade2Earn Loyalty Program: Every trade executed generates loyalty tokens that can be redeemed for account credits, reduced fees, or bonuses. This unique program rewards consistent trading activity.

Scaling Plan

After passing the two-phase evaluation, BrightFunded funded traders gain access to account scaling and growth opportunities.

  • Initial Funded Account: Traders receive a funded account matching the size they evaluated on ($5,000, $10,000, $25,000, or $200,000).
  • Account Scaling Criteria: Account sizes increase based on demonstrated profitability and consistent adherence to risk management rules. Traders with 30+ days of profitable trading typically become eligible for scaling.
  • Scaling Increments: Funded accounts can scale by 25–50% with each milestone, potentially reaching 2–3x the original funded amount after 6–12 months of consistent performance.
  • Scaling Drawdown Rules: Scaling accounts maintain the same daily (5%) and maximum (10%) drawdown limits as evaluation accounts, ensuring consistent risk management.
  • Scaling Timeline: Requests for account increases are typically processed within 5–10 business days upon meeting performance criteria.

BrightFunded Rules vs Competitors

To understand how BrightFunded stacks up against other prop firms, here's a comparison of key rules across leading competitors:

Rule BrightFunded Prop Firm A Prop Firm B
Daily Drawdown 5% 5% 3%
Max Drawdown 10% (trailing) 10% (static) 8% (trailing)
Profit Split 80–100% 70–80% 75–90%
Payout Speed ~4 hours avg / 24h max 5–10 business days 3–5 business days
EA Trading ✓ Fully Permitted ✓ Permitted (limited) ✗ Not Permitted
Markets Offered Forex, Crypto CFD, Indices, Commodities Forex, Indices, Commodities Forex, Stocks, Indices

Key Takeaways:

  • BrightFunded's 4-hour average payout is exceptionally fast — 10–60x faster than competitors, making it ideal for traders needing quick access to profits.
  • The 10% trailing maximum drawdown is slightly more lenient than competitors offering 8% static drawdown, giving traders a bit more recovery potential.
  • BrightFunded's unrestricted EA support and crypto CFD trading are rare among top-tier prop firms, making it the clear choice for algorithmic traders and crypto traders.
  • The 80–100% profit split is competitive and can exceed most competitors for consistent traders.

Red Flags and Fine Print

Before committing to BrightFunded, traders should be aware of the following considerations:

  • Newer Firm (Founded 2023): BrightFunded has only ~3 years of operational history compared to established prop firms with 10+ year track records. While the firm operates legitimately, traders should monitor regulatory compliance and customer reviews closely.
  • CFD-Only Trading: BrightFunded does not offer traditional futures, stocks, or options trading. Traders seeking diverse asset classes will need to fund multiple firms.
  • No Native Mobile App: While the firm supports mobile trading through third-party platform apps (cTrader, DXtrade, MT5), there is no branded BrightFunded mobile application, which may impact usability for mobile-first traders.
  • API Access Not Available: Unlike some competitors, BrightFunded does not offer direct API access for traders building custom trading infrastructure or bots requiring low-latency connectivity.
  • Monthly Subscription Model: Unlike some competitors that charge one-time challenge fees, BrightFunded charges ongoing monthly subscriptions even after passing the challenge, which can reduce profitability for smaller accounts over time.
  • Regulatory Status: BrightFunded operates as a CFD broker under Netherlands/FZCO jurisdiction. Traders should verify regulatory compliance in their home country, particularly regarding CFD trading restrictions (e.g., ESMA restrictions in the EU).
  • Profit Split Variability: While marketed as "80–100%," the exact split depends on account tier and trading volume. Traders should request written confirmation of their exact profit split before funding.
  • Trade2Earn Token Redemption: The fine print on token redemption rates and expiration policies is critical. Traders should clarify whether tokens retain value and have explicit expiration dates.

Verification Recommendation: Before beginning a challenge, traders should review BrightFunded's full terms of service, particularly sections on account elimination, drawdown calculation methodology, and prohibited trading practices. Contact BrightFunded support directly to clarify any ambiguous rules.
author: TradingToolsHub Editorial
